# F058 Row-Wise Abstention Tier 2 Validation

## Decision
`F058_ROWWISE_TIER2_SAFE_BUT_WEAK`

## Purpose
F057 made the first replicated row-wise abstention signal ready for a formal, still non-promoting Tier 2 validation. F058 repeats the same train-only row-wise residual abstention mechanism on six fresh seeds with stricter artifact and stability checks.

## Tier 2 Contract
- promotion allowed: `False`
- fresh seeds: `[22, 23, 24, 25, 26, 27]`
- exact floor preservation required: `True`
- no held-out retrieval breaks required: `True`
- gap standard deviation must not exceed mean gap: `True`

## Mean Metrics
- selected nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- row-wise base scale mean: `0.045833`
- row-wise active fraction mean: `0.462963`
- row-wise effective scale mean: `0.021759`
- heldout local floor preserved: `True`
- active gates pass: `True`
- selected transition: `0.246421`
- floor transition: `0.246335`
- selected delta cosine: `0.882806`
- floor delta cosine: `0.881398`
- selected recall@1: `0.851852`
- floor recall@1: `0.851852`
- selected floor gap transition: `0.000086` (min `-0.000499`, std `0.000274`)
- selected floor gap delta cosine: `0.001408` (min `0.000296`, std `0.001022`)
- selected floor gap recall: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`, std `0.000000`)
- heldout broken rows: `0`
